top_stories.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
top_stories.description: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.
top_stories.author: Rebecca Bellan
top_stories.content: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

top_stories.title: NVIDIA Unlocks AI Compute at Scale, Inviting Partners to Power the AI Infrastructure Buildout
top_stories.description: As AI moves from model development to production inference, compute demand is accelerating and shifting toward continuously operating AI factories that generate tokens at scale. This shift requires access to large‑scale, multi‑tenant accelerated computing that can come online quickly, stay highly utilized and support the economics of token‑scale AI services. Emerging AI companies historically have […]

top_stories.title: Open Models, Closed Environments: Palantir Brings Secure AI to US Agencies With NVIDIA Nemotron
top_stories.description: Showcasing the importance of open source innovation in American AI, Palantir’s new intelligent engine — introduced today — uses NVIDIA Nemotron open models to serve the needs of U.S. government agencies. Open source software has long been a pillar of U.S. technology leadership. In 1969, DARPA connected four university computers — from UCLA, Stanford, UCSB […]

top_stories.title: Qualcomm shares jump 14% on Modular acquisition, guidance upgrade
top_stories.description: Qualcomm Inc.’s stock jumped 14% in after-hours trading today after it shared a series of updates about its artificial intelligence roadmap. The company announced plans to acquire an inference software startup called Modular Inc. and previewed two upcoming AI chips. Additionally, Qualcomm significantly raised its fiscal 2029 guidance. The chipmaker now expects its non-handset revenue […] The post Qualcomm shares jump 14% on Modular acquisition, guidance upgrade appeared first on SiliconANGLE.

top_stories.title: Safely Releasing Frontier Models to Customers
top_stories.description: It’s our goal for AWS to be the most secure place to run any workload, and in support of that we’ve been deeply investing in security across our services since AWS's inception more than two decades ago. Our AI services like Amazon Bedrock are built on this foundation and with the same focus.
top_stories.author: Amy Herzog
top_stories.content: It’s our goal for AWS to be the most secure place to run any workload, and in support of that we’ve been deeply investing in security across our services since AWS's inception more than two decades ago. Our AI services like Amazon Bedrock are built on this foundation and with the same focus.
